chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4431 - وَ رَوَى عَمْرُو بْنُ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْقَابِلَةِ أَ يَحِلُّ لِلْمَوْلُودِ أَنْ يَنْكِحَهَا قَالَ "لاَ وَ لاَ اِبْنَتَهَا هِيَ كَبَعْضِ أُمَّهَاتِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4431 - Amr ibn Shimr reported from Jabir, who said:
I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), about the midwife, whether it is permissible for the child she delivered to marry her.
Imam (as) replied: "No, nor her daughter. She is like one of his mothers."
